articles.title: Skullcandy’s New Wireless Headphones Have So Much Bose in Them - Gizmodo
articles.description: There are three technologies in the Crusher 1080 ANC that have never been in a non-Bose pair of wireless headphones before.
articles.content:
Skullcandy is back with a new pair of wireless headphones, and this time, they’re going big on sound by Bose.

articles.title: Microsoft patches bug in video game Age of Empires II - TechCrunch
articles.description: The vulnerability in the decades-old game could have allowed hackers to take over victims’ computers with a malicious game invite.
articles.content:
On Tuesday, Microsoft patched a historic record number of security bugs across its product lines, in large part due to the use of AI to help the company and external researchers discover bugs.
